settings.code:
<style>

@media only screen and (min-width: 992px) {
.hero__content p {
  width: 25vw;
}
}

@media only screen and (min-width: 3000px) {

.wrapper--full {
max-width: 3000px;}
}
.hero__content h1 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  font-size: 40px;
  font-style: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
  font-weight: var(--BTN-FONT-WEIGHT);
  font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK);
  color: #fbfbfb;
  padding: 0px 0px;
}
.hero__content p {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-style: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
  font-weight: 400;
  font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK);
  color: rgba(251, 251, 251, 0.8);
  padding: 0px 0px;
  letter-spacing: 0.2em;
  line-height: 1.6;
}
</style>
<style>

@media (min-width: 763px) and (max-width: 3000px) {
.hero__content p {
  width: 25vw;
}
.wrapper--full, .hero__content, .wrapper--full-padded, .grid-outer, .grid__items-holder {
max-width: 90vw;
min-width: 90vw;
margin: 0 auto;
}


.index-hero .wrapper--full, .hero__video {
max-width: 100vw !important;
min-width: 100vw !important;
}

.index-hero {
padding-top: 0vh;
}

.grid-outer {
padding:0;
}
.frame__item{
height: 90vh;
}
}



.collection__products, .grid__items-holder {
padding-left:5vw;
padding-right:5vw;
}
.wrapper--full-padded {
padding:0;
}


@media (min-width: 3000px) {
.index-hero {
padding-top: 0vh;
}

.wrapper--full, .hero__content, .wrapper--full-padded, .grid-outer, .index-hero .wrapper--full, .hero__video  {
max-width: 3000px !important;
min-width: 3000px !important;
}

.collection__products {
padding-left: calc((100vw - 3000px) / 2);
}
}

.hero__content h1 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  font-size: 20px;
  font-style: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
  font-weight: var(--BTN-FONT-WEIGHT);
  font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK);
  color: #fbfbfb;
  padding: 0px 0px;
}
.hero__content p {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-style: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
  font-weight: 400;
  font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK);
  color: rgba(251, 251, 251, 0.8);
  padding: 0px 0px;
  letter-spacing: 0.2em;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

@media (min-width: 763px) {
#Rte--template--25036444860712__section_rich_text_gyHydy {
    --PT: 140px;}

.frame__item{
height: 90vh !important;
}
}

@media (max-width: 763px){
CustomCode--template--25036444860712__section_custom_code_87HtKP p{
margin:0;}
.hero__content h1 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  font-size: 22px;
  font-style: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
  font-weight: var(--BTN-FONT-WEIGHT);
  font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK);
  color: #fbfbfb;
  padding: 0px 10px;
}
}

</style>

custom_css: h2 {font-style: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE); font-weight: var(--BTN-FONT-WEIGHT); font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK); width: auto; color: #000; font-size: 20px; border-bottom: 1px black solid; padding-bottom: 10px;}
